---
title: "Matrix Noise Tests"
format: html
---

```{r}
repo_candidates <- c(
  normalizePath(".", winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE),
  normalizePath("..", winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE),
  normalizePath("../..", winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
)
repo_root <- repo_candidates[vapply(repo_candidates, function(path) {
  file.exists(file.path(path, "scripts", "matrix_noise_test_cases.R"))
}, logical(1))][1]

if (is.na(repo_root) || !nzchar(repo_root)) {
  stop("Could not find the repository root for the matrix noise tests.")
}

r_files <- sort(list.files(file.path(repo_root, "R"), pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE))
r_files <- r_files[!grepl("[\\/]legacy[\\/]", r_files)]
invisible(lapply(r_files, source, local = globalenv()))
source(file.path(repo_root, "scripts", "matrix_noise_test_cases.R"), local = globalenv())

cases <- matrix_noise_test_cases()
fit_case <- function(case, noise_type) {
  if (noise_type == "hc") {
    matrix_variate_noise_fit(
      x_list = case$x_list,
      g = 2,
      noise_type = "hc",
      noise_k = 1e-06,
      noise_pi_init = 0.08,
      max_iter = 200,
      tol = 1e-06,
      nstart = 10,
      verbose = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    matrix_variate_noise_fit(
      x_list = case$x_list,
      g = 2,
      noise_type = "br",
      noise_pi_init = 0.08,
      max_iter = 200,
      tol = 1e-06,
      nstart = 10,
      verbose = FALSE
    )
  }
}

fits <- lapply(cases, function(case) {
  list(
    hc = fit_case(case, "hc"),
    br = fit_case(case, "br")
  )
})

summaries <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(cases), function(case_name) {
  case <- cases[[case_name]]
  hc_fit <- fits[[case_name]]$hc
  br_fit <- fits[[case_name]]$br
  data.frame(
    case = case_name,
    r = case$r,
    p = case$p,
    total_matrices = length(case$x_list),
    contamination = case$contam_n,
    hc_noise_count = sum(hc_fit$cluster == 0L),
    br_noise_count = sum(br_fit$cluster == 0L),
    hc_iterations = hc_fit$iterations,
    br_iterations = br_fit$iterations,
    hc_logLik = tail(hc_fit$logLik, 1),
    br_logLik = tail(br_fit$logLik, 1),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

knitr::kable(summaries, caption = "Reproducible matrix noise test summary")
```

## Case Details

```{r}
case_details <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(cases), function(case_name) {
  case <- cases[[case_name]]
  data.frame(
    case = case_name,
    dimensions = paste0(case$r, " x ", case$p),
    contamination = case$contam_n,
    seed = case$seed,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

knitr::kable(case_details, caption = "Test case sizes and contamination settings")
```

## Cluster Counts

```{r}
for (case_name in names(fits)) {
  cat("\n### ", case_name, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("HC cluster counts:\n")
  print(table(fits[[case_name]]$hc$cluster))
  cat("BR cluster counts:\n")
  print(table(fits[[case_name]]$br$cluster))
}
```
